content.body: I wrote (or let AI write) a small script that outputs the scope boundaries of V8 of various ECMAScript snippets: https://crrev.com/c/7633389. Anybody interested in adapting this for Firefox and Safari? I'm currently working on some spec text that how generated ranges should look like for generated JavaScript and I'd be interested what engines currently think the scope boundaries are. Maybe Holger Benl  ? :)

content.body: Unfortunately Firefox currently doesn't provide the scope boundaries via the debug protocol.
